[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000000000 a
1 000000000 a
2 000000000 a
3 000000000 a
4 000000000 a
5 100110110 5
6 010000000 1
7 000101100 3

01 10 110111110 7
12 21 010101101 5
23 32 100001001 3
34 43 001010011 4
45 54 111000110 5
56 65 100001111 5
67 76 100100010 3
70 07 110100010 4

02 20 100010011 4
13 31 110100100 4
24 42 101011010 5
35 53 110010101 5
46 64 011001001 4
57 75 000101101 4
60 06 010000000 1 match 6
71 17 000011100 3

03 30 000011010 3
14 41 111110111 8
25 52 010011100 4
36 63 010011010 4
47 74 111101011 7
50 05 110001111 6
61 16 100111110 6
72 27 010110001 4

04 40 001001001 3
15 51 000110001 3
26 62 110010011 5
37 73 110111000 5
